**HVGERM** - *Human IGHV germlines*

Description
--------------------

A `character` vector of all 498 human IGHV germline gene segment alleles
in IMGT Gene-db release July 2022, with an additional 25 undocumented alleles from VDJbase.


Usage
--------------------
```
HVGERM
```




Format
-------------------

Values correspond to IMGT-gaped nuceltoide sequences (with
nucleotides capitalized and gaps represented by '.').


References
-------------------

Xochelli *et al*. (2014) Immunoglobulin heavy variable
(IGHV) genes and alleles: new entities, new names and implications for
research and prognostication in chronic lymphocytic leukaemia.
*Immunogenetics*. 67(1):61-6.
